roa.docketEntryComment: Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Prior to Release
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
PUB DEFENDER MOT TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT FILED TODAY

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CONTD:TO SET, TRAILING #21010097/DOP/ORMS//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL:TO  SET, TRAILING #21010097/BWSTAY:01-26-22/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:2ND/X: 1 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE (USED IF DEFENDANTHAS MORE THANONE BENCH WARRANT ISSUED ON THE SAME DATE/

/CAL:TO SET, TRAILING #21010097/CONT/DOPC/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANTIS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 02-02-22/X: BAIL SET AT $5,000/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/FTRRECORDED/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D//NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED  TO 10-27-21/X: BAIL SET AT $5,000/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/FTRRECORDED/X:CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/OR/X:PD'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS COUNTS 1 & 2 PER PC 991 IS DENIED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) &DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/X:ON GOING DISCOVERY REQUEST/GTWM/OR/DEF: WITH ENROUTES FROM MERCED/X:STAY OUT OF 564 MARKET STREET, SF,CA/SAORD/X:DEFENSE RECEIVED COPIES OF STAY AWAY ORDER/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/NP/X:THE DEFENDANT REFUSED TO APPEAR IN COURT TODAY/CAL:SHERIFF AFFIDAVITWARRANT/SAWD/CONTD:TO SET, TRAILING #21010097/DOPC/SHER/BAIL:5,000/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/NP/BWR:10-27-21/BWR1/CONTD:TOSET, TRAILING #21010097/DOPC/OR/
